description_long: This is a compact, modern airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a short, rounded nose. The wings are mounted low on the body and are straight with slight dihedral angles, giving the aircraft a stable appearance. The cockpit is enclosed with a blue-tinted canopy, positioned near the front of the fuselage, and appears to be designed for a single pilot. The tail section features a prominent vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted midway up the tail, forming a T-tail configuration. The landing gear consists of two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all of which are fixed and exposed. The exterior is primarily metallic gray with subtle panel lines and minimal markings, suggesting a utilitarian or training role.
description: A compact, metallic gray airplane with low-mounted straight wings, a blue-tinted enclosed cockpit, and a T-tail configuration. It features fixed tricycle landing gear and a streamlined, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, blue-tinted cockpit canopy, and symmetrical low-mounted wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the short fuselage, fixed landing gear, and prominent T-tail structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhaust, T-tail, and the symmetry of the wings and stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit placement, landing gear, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
